core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Professional Trust mixed with High-Energy Growth
Content is King: Data visualization and clarity are paramount
Zoom In: Focus on essential career details
Negative Space: Generous breathing room for stressful tasks

gradients.subtle_mesh: radial-gradient(at 0% 0%, rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.05) 0px, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 100% 100%, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.05) 0px, transparent 50%)

layout_strategies.global_spacing: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid p-4 for main containers.

bento_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
bento_grid.rules: Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children.

tetris_grid.rules: Mix col-span-8 (Hero) with col-span-4 (Supporting). Leave breathing room.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg shadow-slate-900/20 active:scale-95
buttons.accent: bg-orange-500 text-white hover:bg-orange-600 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:border-slate-900 hover:text-slate-900 bg-transparent rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-orange-500/50 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 focus:border-orange-500 transition-all font-medium text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use for Pricing/Feature cards. A glowing gradient line that travels around the container edge.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use for sticky headers and floating navs. backdrop-blur-xl + backdrop-saturate-150.
visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Add subtle noise texture to the background of the landing page to kill digital flatness.

rules: Text contrast must meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 for normal, 3:1 for large).
Interactive elements must have visible focus states (ring-2 ring-offset-2).

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the Dashboard Home.
Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect for the 'Recommended Jobs' cards.
Ensure the Resume Builder uses a Split Screen layout (Form Left, Preview Right).
Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Professional Spark' palette (Slate 900 primary, Orange 500 accent).
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders.
For the Landing Page, use the 'Tetris Grid' layout.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans'.
Do NOT use default Shadcn 'slate' gray. Use the specific 'Professional Spark' palette.
Ensure 2-3x generous spacing (p-8+) in the Dashboard to reduce clutter.
Add micro-interactions (hover, focus) to every button and card.
